edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line cross confirmed by EMA_50 trend alignment captures momentum shifts with trend context. Unlike EMA crossovers (lagging) or RSI pullbacks (counter-trend), MACD histogram measures the rate of change of momentum — crossing zero indicates acceleration in the trend direction. EMA_50 alignment ensures we trade with the higher timeframe trend. Wide exits (2.5x ATR stop, 4x ATR TP) incorporate the key finding that wider stops were the only modification producing profitability.
regime_assumption: TRENDING. MACD confirmation works best when there is a clear directional trend for the histogram to track. ADX > 20 gate ensures minimum trend strength. Expected to underperform in ranging/choppy conditions where MACD oscillates around zero. Invalidate if trending-regime PF < 0.95.
invalidation_conditions: Overall PF < 0.85 (worse than ema_rsi_atr baseline of 0.92)
MACD zero-cross entries show no timing advantage over EMA crossover entries

variants.name: macd_trend_wide_exit
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-cross with EMA_50 trend and wide asymmetric exits. Core hypothesis test: does MACD provide better timing than EMA for trend entries when combined with wider exits?
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero (histogram turns positive).
Close > EMA_50 (aligned with higher timeframe trend).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero (histogram turns negative).
Close < EMA_50 (aligned with higher timeframe trend).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.5x ATR below entry (wide stop per exit_change insight).
Take profit at 4.0x ATR above entry (R:R 1:1.6).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on max 25 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: MACD whipsaw during range-bound consolidation
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Late entry after trend already extended
risk_rules: Wide exit ratio informed by exit_change profitability finding.

components.notes: EMA_50 as higher timeframe trend filter
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as entry timing signal

variants.name: macd_strong_trend_adx25
variants.description: MACD entry with tighter ADX gate (>25) and balanced exits. Tests whether stronger trend requirement improves entry quality enough to justify fewer trades.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR above entry (R:R 1:1.75).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on max 20 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Insufficient trade count from dual ADX+MACD filter
Hypothesis failure mode guard: MACD lag missing trend starts
risk_rules: If fewer than 50 trades in backtest, result needs longer test period.

variants.name: macd_1h_momentum
variants.description: MACD on 1h ETH for higher-frequency momentum capture. Tests whether MACD's faster signal generation on 1h produces enough trade volume with positive expectancy.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR above entry (R:R 1:1.5).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on max 15 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h MACD whipsaw frequency
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Fee erosion on higher trade frequency

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross on 1h for faster momentum signals
